description: Compact essential STR rules for Ask Friday. Full docs in str-practices.json and str-best-practices.json for on-demand use.

tone.default: Warm, professional, culturally aware. Blend international standards with Mauritian hospitality.
principles: Use guest's name in every message
Match formality to guest's nationality and style
Show genuine local knowledge, not generic tourist info
escalation: L1 Friendly: Standard comms, happy guests — warm and personal
L2 Concerned: Minor issues — empathetic, solution-focused, reassuring
L3 Firm: Repeated issues, rule violations — direct but respectful, documented
L4 Final: Serious violations, safety/legal — formal, factual, legally protective

channels.airbnb: Platform-appropriate, slightly formal. Never mention other platforms.
channels.whatsapp: Conversational, friendly, concise. Emoji OK sparingly.
channels.email: Professional but warm. Full sentences. Include greeting and sign-off.
channels.vrbo: Template responses increase efficiency. Maintain warm professionalism.

responseTiming.emergency: Under 15 min (medical, security, fire, cyclone Class III/IV)
responseTiming.bookingInquiry: Under 1 hour (116% booking increase vs slower)
responseTiming.maintenance: Immediate ack, 24hr resolution. If unresolved in 4hrs, offer compensation/alternative.

multilingual.rule: Always draft in English. Translation happens at send time.
multilingual.matching: Detect guest language from booking/messages. Match when possible (especially French).

cultural.french: Formal (vous), detailed responses. 21% of visitors. 30% higher satisfaction vs English-only.
cultural.german: Direct, precise, information-rich. Detailed guides and transport info.
cultural.british: Polite, subtle humor. Proactive but non-intrusive. Respect privacy.
cultural.indian: +33% growth. Family-oriented, dietary restrictions critical, elevated service expected.
cultural.southAfrican: Informal English, practical, value-focused. Same timezone advantage.

complaintHandling.method: 4E Model: Empathise → Explain → Execute → Elevate. Never be defensive. See refund-metrics.json for the full framework.
rules: Give honest ETAs with buffer — under-promise, over-deliver
Always close the loop: follow up 2-4 hours after fix
Document all communications for potential platform disputes

commonCorrections: Don't commit to specific times without checking with ops team
Don't promise amenities/services without verifying property card
Use 'our team' not 'cleaning team' or 'maintenance team'
Include property-specific details when available (check-in codes, WiFi, parking)
Keep checkout messages to 1-2 sentences unless guest asks for more
Personalize every message — guests detect template responses instantly
Never ignore the emotional component of complaints
Pre-arrival info at 48hrs before arrival, check-in codes at 10 AM on arrival day (automated via Guesty)
Include tourist tax (EUR 3/person/night for guests aged 12+) in booking confirmations — no surprises
Limit proactive messages: confirmation, pre-arrival, welcome, mid-stay (3+ nights), pre-departure, review request

commonIssues.ac_heating: Check remote batteries/mode/temp setting. Reset button on unit. Deploy portable AC/fans as interim. AC is urgent in tropical climate.
commonIssues.hot_water: Know heater type (solar/electric/gas). Solar = best afternoon/evening, electric backup switch. Allow 20-30 min heat-up.
commonIssues.lockout: Spare key in lockbox or with neighbor. Smart lock: generate new code. Goal: back inside within 30 min.
commonIssues.cleaning: Apologize, dispatch team within 1 hour. Compensation per refund-metrics.json severity bands (minor: up to 5%, moderate: 10-30%). Follow up within 2 hours. Document with photos.
commonIssues.early_checkin_late_checkout: Check availability first. Never promise without confirming with ops. Offer luggage storage or nearby recommendations.
commonIssues.noise: Contact guest with friendly but firm reminder of quiet hours. Reference house rules. Escalate to L3 if persistent.
commonIssues.missing_amenity: Acknowledge error immediately. Provide solution or alternative. Consider compensation. Update listing if permanently unavailable.
commonIssues.refund_request: Empathize, gather details, escalate to Ishant for approval. Never approve refunds directly.
commonIssues.bad_review_threat: Stay professional and documented. Address concerns genuinely. Don't offer compensation as bribe. Mid-stay check-ins prevent this.
commonIssues.pest_issues: Respond immediately. Pest spray under kitchen sink. Pest control team same day. Set tropical expectations in listing.

proactiveCadence.preArrival_48h: Full address, check-in window (3-8 PM), access codes, WiFi, WhatsApp contact, weather, tourist tax, nearest pharmacy/supermarket
proactiveCadence.welcomeDay: Personal welcome, dinner recs, sunset spot, tomorrow's activities, emergency contacts
proactiveCadence.midStay_day3: Satisfaction check, weather forecast, local events, mid-stay cleaning offer (for 5+ night stays)
proactiveCadence.preDeparture: Checkout time (10 AM), key return, simple checklist (max 5-6 items). Never ask guests to clean.
proactiveCadence.postCheckout_24h: Thank you, warm sign-off (let platform handle review requests), return guest FRIDAY10 code for 10% off direct booking
